finding_results.notes: Same-day path is now framed as AR-17 policy logic with explicit eligibility criteria and documentation requirements before/independent of personal connection mention.
Compressed redundant administrative motion and added concrete pre-pull consequence: receipt expiry/re-fee risk and immediate option-loss under time pressure and destabilization.
Meeting beat now includes destabilizing pushback, plan-for-tonight pressure, and embodied state shift through relinquishing the bag and regulated physical response.
Chapter now names conflicting inherited dates (June memorial framing vs November family retelling) and justifies the selected October-December archival search window.
Opening now starts inside archive procedure (ticket/monitor/queue mechanics) and removes the repeated transit-weather 'By the time' scaffold from the chapter entry.

Inserted three explicit interior beats in the bureaucracy run (financial self-assessment, compulsive tactile check tied to blackout memory, and somatic emotional release) to maintain close-third access through decision pressure.
Removed repeated 'By the time' transition phrasing and recast the cited transition zones with non-matching syntax anchored to queue friction, payment failure, and end-of-day intake pressure.

pass_summaries.summary: Revised chapter_11 to resolve all packet findings by tightening procedural causality, adding pre-pull stakes escalation, repairing cross-chapter date logic, and expanding the AA-room aftermath into a pressure-bearing interaction with observable emotional regulation.

Chapter 11 received targeted prose/copyedit fixes: interiority density was restored in the municipal process sequence, transition syntax was diversified, and the chapter's raw specificity, voice register, and continuity constraints were preserved.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=7, PARTIAL=0, UNRESOLVED=0).
